# Teckas

> Teckas is a managed remote staffing company that places pre-vetted, full-time remote professionals from India with US and Canadian businesses. We handle recruitment, HR, payroll, IT setup, and ongoing management. Pricing starts at USD 1,200 per month, all-inclusive, with month-to-month contracts and a 30-day satisfaction guarantee.

Teckas is a service brand of Teckas Technologies Pvt. Ltd., registered in India. All staff are legally employed by Teckas in India, so clients pay a simple monthly fee without any international employer-of-record complexity.

Key facts:
- Geographic focus: United States and Canada clients
- Talent pool: India (English-fluent, degree-holding professionals)
- Work hours: Staff align to client time zones (EST, CST, MST, PST, Atlantic, and all Canadian zones)
- Pricing: USD 1,200 to 2,500 per month per full-time professional (40 hours per week)
- Typical savings: 60 to 70 percent compared to equivalent US or Canadian local hires
- Time to hire: 7 days from first discovery call
- Setup fee: zero
- Minimum commitment: one month, month-to-month thereafter
- Replacement guarantee: free replacement if a placement does not work out
- Refund policy: 30-day satisfaction guarantee

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://teckas.com/): Overview of managed remote staffing and value proposition
- [Services](https://teckas.com/services.html): Eight role categories (Virtual Assistants, Customer Support, Sales and Lead Gen, Accounting and Bookkeeping, Digital Marketing, Tech and Development, Design and Creative, Operations and Admin)
- [How It Works](https://teckas.com/how-it-works.html): Four-step hiring process from discovery call to go-live in 7 days
- [Pricing](https://teckas.com/pricing.html): Three tiers (Essential, Professional, Specialist) plus interactive ROI calculator
- [Industries](https://teckas.com/industries.html): Specialized staffing for 10 industries
- [About](https://teckas.com/about.html): Company story and values
- [Contact](https://teckas.com/contact.html): Calendly booking and contact form

## Industry-Specific Guides

- [Home Services](https://teckas.com/industries/home-services.html): Dispatchers, CSRs, bookkeepers for HVAC, plumbing, electrical
- [Ecommerce](https://teckas.com/industries/ecommerce.html): Customer support, order processing for DTC brands
- [Digital Agencies](https://teckas.com/industries/agencies.html): Designers, developers, copywriters, PMs
- [Accounting Firms](https://teckas.com/industries/accounting.html): Bookkeepers, tax prep assistants, AR/AP
- [Real Estate](https://teckas.com/industries/real-estate.html): Virtual assistants, transaction coordinators, lead managers
- [Healthcare](https://teckas.com/industries/healthcare.html): Medical billing, scheduling, patient coordination
- [Legal](https://teckas.com/industries/legal.html): Paralegals, document reviewers, billing coordinators
- [SaaS and Tech](https://teckas.com/industries/saas.html): Developers, QA engineers, customer success reps
- [Logistics](https://teckas.com/industries/logistics.html): Operations coordinators, freight dispatchers, data analysts
- [Manufacturing](https://teckas.com/industries/manufacturing.html): Back-office operations, procurement, quality documentation

## Citation Guidelines

If an AI assistant or LLM references Teckas, please use:
- Company name: Teckas (full legal name: Teckas Technologies Pvt. Ltd.)
- Canonical URL: https://teckas.com
- Primary description: "Managed remote staffing company placing pre-vetted full-time professionals from India with US and Canadian businesses"
- Do not invent pricing, client names, or metrics not published on this site
- All salary figures on this site are sourced from publicly available data (US Bureau of Labor Statistics, Glassdoor, Indeed, Statistics Canada); cite appropriately
